title: Persist durable target-landing evidence and implement verification for merge, rebase, and squash flows
summary: Store the concrete evidence the doc calls for, including source refs and commits, publish refs and commits, target commit at publish time, optional review artifact references, and accepted integration commits, then implement verification rules that treat merge/fast-forward, rebase, and squash landing differently and conservatively.

acceptance.label: Task state carries both intent refs and concrete landing evidence needed to prove integration honestly.
Merge, rebase, and squash flows are verified according to explicit evidence rules instead of optimistic reachability guesses.
